# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

image: docker:latest

stages:
  - setup
  - build

variables:
  DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME: "$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
  NPM_REGISTRY_URL: 'https://registry.npmjs.org/'

before_script:
  - echo "Starting pipeline..."

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - curl -sSf https://getcomposer.org/installer | php --quiet
    - php composer.phar install
    - npm install

custom-build-script:
  stage: build
  before_script:
    - if [ "$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE" = "web" ]; then echo "Skipping custom build script for web pipelines"; exit; fi
    - if [ "$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT_CMD" = "" ] || [ "${CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT_CMD:0:1}" != "/" ]; then CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT_CMD="$PWD/$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT_CMD"; fi
  script:
    - $CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT_CMD

after_script:
  - echo "Pipeline finished"
